# goagent

goagent is a local-first Go / Weiqi / Baduk AI agent.

Official site: https://goagent.top/
GitHub: https://github.com/wimi321/GoAgent
Releases: https://github.com/wimi321/GoAgent/releases

Core principle: KataGo provides evidence, LLM explains, quality gates reduce fabricated claims.

Privacy principle: game records, student profiles, teacher sessions, settings, and analysis cache stay local by default. LLM and custom TTS calls happen only after user configuration and user-initiated tasks.
